sentences.arabic: تُشَكِّلُ قَضِيَّةُ التَّغَيُّرِ الْمُنَاخِيِّ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ مِحْوَرًا جَوْهَرِيًّا فِي التَّجَاذُبَاتِ الْجِيُوسِيَاسِيَّةِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pitanje klimatskih promjena u posljednje vrijeme predstavlja suštinsku osovinu u globalnim geopolitičkim trvenjima.
sentences.translationEn: The issue of climate change has recently constituted a fundamental axis in global geopolitical tensions.

sentences.arabic: حَيْثُ لَمْ تَعُدْ تَقْتَصِرُ هَذِهِ الْمُعْضِلَةُ عَلَى الْأَبْعَادِ الْبِيئِيَّةِ الصِّرْفَةِ، بَلْ تَجَاوَزَتْهَا لِتَمَسَّ جَوْهَرَ الْأَمْنِ الْقَوْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ova dilema više se ne ograničava samo na čisto ekološke dimenzije, već ih je prevazišla dotičući samu srž nacionalne sigurnosti.
sentences.translationEn: This dilemma is no longer limited to purely environmental dimensions; it has transcended them to touch the core of national security.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِارْتِفَاعَ الْمُطَّرِدَ فِي دَرَجَاتِ الْحَرَارَةِ يُنْذِرُ بِتَهْجِيرٍ قَسْرِيٍّ لِمَلَايِينِ السُّكَّانِ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Stalni porast temperatura najavljuje prisilno raseljavanje miliona stanovnika širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: The steady rise in temperatures portends the forced displacement of millions of people around the world.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا يَعْقُبُ ذَلِكُ مِنْ ذَوَبَانِ الْكُتَلِ الْجَلِيدِيَّةِ سَيُؤَدِّي حَتْمًا إِلَى غَرَقِ مُدُنٍ سَاحِلِيَّةٍ بِأَكْمَلِهَا.
sentences.translation: Ono što slijedi nakon toga, poput topljenja ledenih masa, neizbježno će dovesti do potapanja čitavih obalnih gradova.
sentences.translationEn: The subsequent melting of ice masses will inevitably lead to the submergence of entire coastal cities.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ نُشُوبَ صِرَاعَاتٍ مَرِيرَةٍ عَلَى الْمَوَارِدِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةِ النَّاضِبَةِ بَاتَ أَمْرًا وَاقِعًا فِي بَعْضِ الْأَقَالِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Također, izbijanje gorkih sukoba oko iscrpljenih prirodnih resursa postalo je stvarnost u nekim regijama.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, the outbreak of bitter conflicts over depleting natural resources has become a reality in some regions.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ تَزَايُدِ حِدَّةِ الْجَفَافِ، تَجِدُ الْحُكُومَاتُ نَفْسَهَا أَمَامَ مَسْؤُولِيَّةٍ تَارِيخِيَّةٍ لَا تَقْبَلُ التَّأْجِيلَ.
sentences.translation: S povećanjem intenziteta suše, vlade se nalaze pred istorijskom odgovornošću koja ne trpi odlaganje.
sentences.translationEn: With the increasing severity of drought, governments find themselves facing a historical responsibility that brooks no delay.

sentences.arabic: فَالْأَمْنُ الْغِذَائِيُّ وَالْمَائِيُّ هُمَا الرَّكِيزَتَانِ اللَّتَانِ تَقُومُ عَلَيْهِمَا اسْتِقْرَارُ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Prehrambena i vodna sigurnost su dva stuba na kojima počiva stabilnost ljudskih društava.
sentences.translationEn: Food and water security are the two pillars upon which the stability of human societies rests.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَوُّلَ نَحْوَ الِاقْتِصَادِ الْأَخْضَرِ يَمْثُلُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الِاسْتِرَاتِيجِيَّاتِ الدُّوَلِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prelazak na zelenu ekonomiju predstavlja kamen temeljac modernih međunarodnih strategija.
sentences.translationEn: The transition toward a green economy represents the cornerstone of modern international strategies.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ الْفَجْوَةَ التِّقْنِيَّةَ بَيْنَ الشَّمَالِ وَالْجَنُوبِ لَا تَزَالُ تُعَرْقِلُ مَسَاعِيَ التَّعَاضُدِ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, tehnički jaz između sjevera i juga i dalje koči napore globalne solidarnosti.
sentences.translationEn: However, the technical gap between the North and the South continues to hinder global solidarity efforts.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا يَسْتَوْجِبُ إِعَادَةَ نَظَرٍ شَامِلَةٍ فِي مَفَاهِيمِ الْعَدَالَةِ الْمُنَاخِيَّةِ وَتَوْزِيعِ الْأَعْبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: To zahtijeva sveobuhvatno preispitivanje koncepata klimatske pravde i raspodjele tereta.
sentences.translationEn: This necessitates a comprehensive reconsideration of the concepts of climate justice and the distribution of burdens.

sentences.arabic: لَا بُدَّ لِلْقُوَى الْعُظْمَى أَنْ تَقُومَ بِتَمْوِيلِ مَشَارِيعِ التَّكَيُّفِ فِي الدُّوَلِ النَّامِيَةِ بِشَكْلٍ فَعَّالٍ.
sentences.translation: Velike sile moraju efikasno finansirati projekte prilagođavanja u zemljama u razvoju.
sentences.translationEn: Great powers must effectively fund adaptation projects in developing countries.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْمَصِيرَ الْبَشَرِيَّ مُرْتَبِطٌ ارْتِبَاطًا عُضْوِيًّا بِوَحْدَةِ الْهَدَفِ وَالْعَمَلِ الْجَمَاعِيِّ الْمُشْتَرَكِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudska sudbina je organski povezana s jedinstvom cilja i zajedničkim kolektivnim djelovanjem.
sentences.translationEn: Human destiny is organically linked to unity of purpose and joint collective action.

sentences.arabic: فَالْتَّحَدِّي الْمَاثِلُ أَمَامَنَا الْيَوْمَ هُوَ اخْتِبَارٌ حَقِيقِيٌّ لِلْإِرَادَةِ السِّيَاسِيَّةِ لَدَى زُعَمَاءِ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Izazov s kojim se danas suočavamo pravi je test političke volje svjetskih lidera.
sentences.translationEn: The challenge facing us today is a true test of the political will of world leaders.

sentences.arabic: وَبِدُونِ تَعَاوُنٍ حَقِيقِيٍّ، سَيَظَلُّ كَوْكَبُنَا عُرْضَةً لِتَقَلُّبَاتٍ بِيئِيَّةٍ قَدْ تَقْضِي عَلَى مَظَاهِرِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Bez istinske saradnje, naša planeta će ostati podložna ekološkim fluktuacijama koje bi mogle uništiti oblike života.
sentences.translationEn: Without genuine cooperation, our planet will remain vulnerable to environmental fluctuations that could end the manifestations of life.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الْخِتَامِ، يَبْقَى الْأَمَلُ مَعْقُودًا عَلَى الْوَعْيِ الْجَمْعِيِّ لِلشُّعُوبِ لِفَرْضِ التَّغْيِيرِ الْمَنْشُودِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, nada ostaje položena u kolektivnu svijest naroda da nametnu željenu promjenu.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, hope remains pinned on the collective consciousness of peoples to impose the desired change.
